report.summary: Critical SEO conflict surfaced by EOD QA: middleware noindex blocks 684 of 742 published pages from indexing. Sanctum guide built but not merged to disk. Publish queue still blocked.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle: flat (overnight US hours, EU sessions ticking up as expected)
Top pages holding steady: ETH staking calculator, liberation-day anniversary post, exchange compare hub, DCA calculator, gas tracker
Search Console: no new keyword breakouts; impressions stable, CTR unchanged
CRITICAL context: EOD QA revealed ~684 pages are being sent noindex via middleware despite being in sitemap — actual indexable footprint may be far smaller than 742

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup: build, design, publish, and EOD QA (×2) all ran — full rotation completed
Build cycle: Sanctum Solana LST guide researched, written, SEO-optimized — BUT page.tsx and OG SVG not on disk (worktree not merged)
Design cycle: OG image created for Sanctum, UX audit passed, sticky-TOC enhancement flagged for future
Publish cycle: 0 promotions — monad-guide and zora-attention-markets still lack page.tsx
EOD QA: Found CRITICAL middleware/sitemap SEO conflict (58 pillar pages vs 742 in sitemap)
Blockers: (1) Sanctum worktree merge, (2) middleware PILLAR_PAGES sync, (3) scaffold monad + zora pages

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1) FIX CRITICAL: Sync middleware PILLAR_PAGES with PUBLISHED_PAGES — 684 pages are being de-indexed. This is the highest-priority item; all other work is moot if Google can't index the site
2) Merge Sanctum guide from worktree to disk so it can enter the publish pipeline
3) Scaffold monad-guide and zora-attention-markets page.tsx files to unblock the publish queue
